title: Airport Check-in
opening: Hello. Do you have your passport and ticket ready?

t1.prompt: Hello. Do you have your passport and ticket ready?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello. Do you have your passport and ticket ready? — Hello. Do you have your passport and ticket ready?

t2.prompt: Great. Please place your bag on the scale.
t2.promptTranslation: Great. Please place your bag on the scale. — Great. Please place your bag on the scale.

t3.prompt: Please find your passport and ticket. We need them to check you in.
t3.promptTranslation: Please find your passport and ticket. We need them to check you in. — Please find your passport and ticket. We need them to check you in.

t4.prompt: Your bag is fine. Here is your boarding pass. Please go to Gate B7.
t4.promptTranslation: Your bag is fine. Here is your boarding pass. Please go to Gate B7.

t5.prompt: Your bag is a little heavy. Please remove some items or pay a fee.
t5.promptTranslation: Your bag is a little heavy. Please remove some items or pay a fee.

t6.prompt: Gate B7 is straight ahead, after security. Follow the signs.
t6.promptTranslation: Gate B7 is straight ahead, after security. Follow the signs.

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't understand. Can you please repeat that?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't understand. Can you please repeat that?

t-end.prompt: Thank you, have a safe flight!
t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you, have a safe flight!
